title: Gray sky overly
description: This sky pack will help with both eye strain and esthetic
body:
why gray?
ever seen a digital artists plank paper? well if you havent, its a light gray to help avoid eye strain!

why isnt it working?
Make sure the pack is ontop of your other packs! this will not hide your other packs but will make sure the sky shows through.

Will this pack be updated to the newset version?
ill be looking into getting this pack updated to newer versions but for now it will remain on 1.8.9 

NEEDS OPTIFINE TO RUN 

Please email me here with any issues: wowmoonwow@proton.me
